title: REGISTERED CLIENT SERVICE ASSOCIATE
description: To obtain a position where my years of experience in the client support environment and proven track record of maintaining and developing new businesses can be fully utilized. Results-oriented, high-energy, hands-on professional, with a successful record of accomplishments in client support. Major strengths include strong leadership, excellent communication skills, strong team player, attention to detail, compliance in all regulated environment and supervisory skills.
experience: Currently a Registered Client Service Associate, serving as primary contact to investment clients, providing operational support, aiding Financial Advisors with presentations and marketing materials, referring clients to other banking divisions, and working to manage a $40 million book of business. Previously a Relationship Banker II, serving retail and commercial clients, opening new accounts, cross-selling products, and consistently ranking in the top 10 for sales, significantly increasing branch non-interest income, loan portfolio, and net deposit portfolio, and training new hires. Also worked as a Private Banker, conducting outside sales, performing operational tasks like reconciliation, opening various accounts, and handling customer information using Impact. Earlier, held a role as a Technical Writer/Web Developer, responsible for creating and editing product and service documentation, including hardware/software manuals, online help, and programming documents, along with installation and maintenance of computer, security, and telecommunications systems.
